The '''Battle of Choal''' was a skirmish in the [[Battle of Jabiim]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In it, a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] force under [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Norcuna]] was wiped out by the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] while trying to capture the city of [[Choal]].

{{Battle-stub}}
